calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatoriues, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, PLaintiff Silu Chen's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatoriues, And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant as follows: The unopposed Motion is granted. Defendant David Shek is ordered, within 30 days of the signed Order, to serve Code-compliant verified responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production of Documents, to produce responsive documents, and to provide a privilege log if any documents are withheld based on a claim of privilege. Sanctions are awarded against defendant Shek in the amount of $2,000.00 and shall be paid within 30 days of the signed Order. Plaintiff Chen is to prepare the Order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Melinda Derish for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
